name: Jordan Pack
signatureMoves: TOUR OF THE WOODS (tour of the islands)
whyImHere:
Jordan Pack did not come to OWL for fame, championships, or acceptance. Known only as “The Mad Wolf,” Pack emerged from the woods of Durango, Colorado, where rumors claim he was raised among wolves. Whether those stories are true remains unknown—and Pack has never cared enough to explain himself.

A loner by nature, he enters the ring wearing a wolf headdress and a straitjacket, unleashing years of frustration through overwhelming strength and brutal violence. Pack displays the instincts of a predator: patient, territorial, relentless, and always ready to strike. Wrestling gives him a place to release the rage that has followed him out of the wilderness. He is not here to belong. He is here to hunt.

name: Errol Capleton
whyImHere:
Errol Capleton carries the rhythm, pride, and fighting spirit of Jamaica everywhere he goes. Known as “Bad Mon” and celebrated by many as the Pride of Jamaica, Capleton enters OWL determined to represent his homeland on the biggest stage possible. His energy is infectious, but opponents quickly learn that the smile disappears once the bell rings.

Capleton relies on explosive speed, sharp instincts, and unpredictable strikes that can end a match before his opponent realizes they are in danger. One moment he is dancing just outside their reach; the next, they are staring up at the lights. He fights with confidence, heart, and the belief that every victory belongs not only to him, but to everyone back home cheering his name.

name: Killian Crowe
whyImHere:
Killian Crowe did not come to OWL seeking attention. Attention inevitably finds him. Operating from the shadows, Crowe studies every opponent, every weakness, and every careless decision before choosing the perfect moment to strike. Nothing he does is accidental; every movement carries purpose, and every victory is another piece of a design only he fully understands.

Crowe refuses to be defined as hero, villain, or anything so ordinary. He considers himself an enigma—an independent force bound to no cause and controlled by no one. OWL offers stronger competition, greater influence, and a larger stage upon which to expose those who mistake mystery for weakness. By the time his opponents understand Killian Crowe, it is already far too late.

name: Nick Stone
whyImHere:
Nick Stone earned the name “Hard to Kill” the hard way. Across the independent circuit, he built a reputation for surviving punishment that would finish anyone else—and then finding another gear when the match mattered most. Stone brings rare flair to the ring, blending speed, power, and showmanship into a style that is impossible to ignore.

He is flashy because he has earned the right to be. Every pose, taunt, and confident grin is backed by the ability to deliver once the bell rings. Stone does not confuse confidence with arrogance; he simply knows exactly how good he is. After becoming a favorite everywhere he competed, he came to OWL to prove that his success was never limited to the independents. Bigger stage, tougher opponents—same result.

name: Ronin Fairchild
whyImHere:
Ronin Fairchild arrived in OWL with the confidence of a man who has never been told no—and the pedigree to make sure no one forgets it. Hailing from Chelsea and raised in wealth, privilege, and refinement, Fairchild presents himself as the perfect gentleman: polished, educated, and convinced he is the standard everyone else should be judged against.

But beneath the manners and sophistication is a ruthless competitor who will bend the rules whenever it serves him. Like any true aristocrat, Fairchild believes winning is simply his birthright. Backed by elite training money could buy and a smug certainty that he is physically and mentally superior, he steps into OWL to prove that class, skill, and status still reign above all. In Ronin Fairchild’s world, excellence should always look expensive.

name: Mack Aleven
whyImHere:
Mack Aleven knows what it means to come from a place where people expect your story to end before it ever really begins. Raised in the hard streets of southwest Atlanta, “Bulletproof” once lived with the kind of energy, confidence, and street mentality that made him respected—but also nearly cost him everything. After catching a gun charge, Aleven turned to wrestling as his way out, trading the streets for the ring without losing the swagger that made him who he is.

At just 5'6", he gets overlooked until the bell rings. Then the underestimation disappears fast. Mack moves with explosive agility, fearless instincts, and the sharp confidence of a young street general who refuses to back down. He is here to prove that survival made him dangerous—but wrestling made him unstoppable.

name: Riley King
whyImHere:
Riley King carries himself like a man who already knows where he belongs—at the top. Known as “The Golden Child,” King believes his years on the independent scene have prepared him to stand among the best young wrestlers in the industry. He is not chasing hype or living off potential. He sees himself as the next great standard-bearer, built on skill, confidence, and a bloodline of wrestling excellence reflected in his kingly identity.

In the ring, King combines sharp technique, quick instincts, and the kind of polished all-around ability that makes him dangerous against anyone. But for all the talent and pedigree, his purpose is simple: win. Riley King came to OWL for one thing and one thing only—gold. If greatness runs in his lineage, then championships are his destiny.

name: Jayden Alfah
whyImHere:
Jayden Alfah grew up seeing wrestling and anime the same way: as stories about people refusing to stay down when the world tells them they have reached their limit. Whenever life knocked him off course, he treated it like another chapter—not the ending. That mindset followed him into wrestling, where every setback became training, every rival became a new obstacle, and every match became part of his climb toward something greater.

Inspired by the intensity and imagination of his favorite wrestler, Kenny Omega, Jayden developed a style built around explosive offense, dramatic momentum shifts, and relentless resolve. He calls himself “Omega Level” because he believes there is always another transformation waiting inside him. Jayden came to OWL to prove that main-character determination is not fantasy—it is what happens when someone refuses to quit before reaching the final chapter.

name: Allen Rain
whyImHere:
Rain Allen was born in Toronto, but everything about him feels like a warning from the sky before disaster hits. Known as “The Storm Bringer,” Allen carries himself with quiet focus until the bell rings—then the calm disappears. His style is sudden, sharp, and unpredictable, built on fast strikes, explosive movement, and the ability to change the pace of a match without warning.

Rain does not need to shout to make people feel his presence. He believes pressure reveals the truth: who can survive, who will break, and who was never ready for the storm in the first place. OWL gives him the perfect place to test that theory. Every opponent steps into the forecast. Rain Allen decides how bad the damage gets.
